en.title: Air Fryer Checklist: Capacity, Wattage, and Cleanup Before Summer Kitchen Heat
en.description: Seven air fryer checks before summer — basket liters, wattage, presets, nonstick coating, dishwasher parts, counter clearance, and oven overlap.
